scripts.test:mvp: cargo run -p edge-cli -- run --task examples/tasks/basic-task.json --workspace .canonical/session.jsonl && cargo run -p edge-cli -- replay --workspace .canonical/session.jsonl && cargo run -p edge-cli -- validate --workspace .canonical/session.jsonl && cargo run -p edge-cli -- report --workspace .canonical/session.jsonl --out reports/out/canonical-edge-report.md
